drumscript.detect_tempo¶

detect_tempo(audio_input, full=False)[source]¶

Public wrapper for tempo detection.

Parameters:

  • audio_input (str or np.ndarray) – File path OR loaded audio data.

  • full (bool, optional) – Return detailed stats if True.

Returns:

The estimated BPM (float) or a dictionary of stats.

Return type:

float or dict
